analysis.executive_summary: Audit of developer.crowdstrike.com/docs covered 19 pages (100% of discovered scope, 1.9% of max capacity). Zero broken links detected across all categories. API reference coverage is 0% despite 2 API pages detected, indicating missing usage documentation. Freshness metadata exists on only 15.79% of pages. Overall confidence is 81%, with API confidence notably lower at 55%.
strengths: Zero broken links: no internal, docs, or repository navigation link failures
100% crawl coverage of discovered documentation scope
Example reliability estimate at 100% for detected code samples
No crawl traps or scope leakage issues
risks: API reference coverage at 0% despite 2 API pages detected—critical gap in usage documentation
SEO/GEO issue rate of 11.84% may impact discoverability and search ranking
Only 15.79% of pages display last-updated metadata, obscuring content freshness
API confidence score of 55% indicates potential detection limitations in API documentation analysis
Small crawl sample (19 pages) may not represent full documentation estate
Multi-project topology detected but only 19 pages crawled suggests incomplete discovery
Low freshness visibility creates risk of users relying on outdated information

prioritized_actions.action: Create usage documentation and integration guides for 2 detected API pages to achieve measurable reference coverage
Implement last-updated timestamps on remaining 84.21% of pages lacking freshness metadata
Audit and resolve SEO/GEO issues affecting 11.84% of pages (meta descriptions, titles, structured data)
Investigate multi-project topology to confirm all documentation projects are discoverable and crawlable
Review API page detection methodology given 55% confidence score to ensure comprehensive coverage

limitations: Audit crawled only 19 pages; full documentation estate may contain additional issues not visible in this sample
API coverage detection confidence at 55% suggests potential false negatives in API page identification
External audit cannot verify accuracy, completeness, or technical correctness of documentation content
Link verification does not guarantee destination page quality, relevance, or up-to-date information
Multi-project topology may have undiscovered projects or sections not accessible from audited entry points
